title: Compensation and Benefits Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate compensation and benefits activities of an organization.

tasks.text: Direct preparation and distribution of written and verbal information to inform employees of benefits, compensation, and personnel policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design, evaluate, and modify benefits policies to ensure that programs are current, competitive, and in compliance with legal requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fulfill all reporting requirements of all relevant government rules and regulations, including the Employee Retirement Income Security Act (ERISA).
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze compensation policies, government regulations, and prevailing wage rates to develop competitive compensation plan.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and implement benefits to increase the quality of life for employees by working with brokers and researching benefits issues.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage the design and development of tools to assist employees in benefits selection, and to guide managers through compensation decisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer, direct, and review employee benefit programs, including the integration of benefit programs following mergers and acquisitions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mediate between benefits providers and employees, such as by assisting in handling employees' benefits-related questions or taking suggestions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan, direct, supervise, and coordinate work activities of subordinates and staff relating to employment, compensation, labor relations, and employee relations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare detailed job descriptions and classification systems and define job levels and families, in partnership with other managers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop methods to improve employment policies, processes, and practices, and recommend changes to management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Formulate policies, procedures and programs for recruitment, testing, placement, classification, orientation, benefits and compensation, and labor and industrial relations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study legislation, arbitration decisions, and collective bargaining contracts to assess industry trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct new-employee orientations to foster positive attitude toward organizational objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare budgets for personnel operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate bargaining agreements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare personnel forecasts to project employment needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records and compile statistical reports concerning personnel-related data, such as hires, transfers, performance appraisals, and absenteeism rates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze statistical data and reports to identify and determine causes of personnel problems, and develop recommendations for improvement of organization's personnel policies and practices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contract with vendors to provide employee services, such as food services, transportation, or relocation service.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise management on such matters as equal employment opportunity, sexual harassment, and discrimination.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent organization at personnel-related hearings and investigations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
